zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Haydock於1407年出生在英國英格蘭爾史利格利時，她的父親Gilbert Haydock41歲，母親Isabel de Houghton22歲。她於大約1414年與Sir Robert Downes在英國英格蘭藍卡爾海多可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1461年之後在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Haydock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Czech or Polish Hejduk , Polish, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia and Poland), or Czech Hajduk , and of their Hungarian cognate Hajdók. Compare Hydock .

variants.name: Haddock
meanings: variant of the Lancashire surname Haydock , a habitational name from a place so called near Liverpool, which is probably named from Welsh heiddog ‘characterized by barley’.
from the Middle English personal name Addoc, a pet form of Old English Æddi (itself perhaps derived from one of the names in ēad ‘wealth, prosperity’), with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Haydock was born in 1407, in Shrigley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gilbert Haydock, was 41 and her mother, Isabel de Houghton, was 22. She married Sir Robert Downes about 1414, in Haydock, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1461, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Haydock est née en 1407, à Shrigley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Haydock, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Houghton, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Downes environ 1414, à Haydock, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1461, à Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Haydockが1407年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアシュリグリーで生まれた時，父Gilbert Haydockは41歳，母Isabel de Houghtonは22歳であった。約1414年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアヘイドックでSir Robert Downesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1461年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Haydock(이)가 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 슈리글리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert Haydock(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Houghton(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 헤이독에서 Sir Robert Downes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Haydock nasceu em 1407, em Shrigley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert Haydock, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Houghton, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Downes aproximadamente 1414, em Haydock, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1461, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Haydock родилась в 1407 г. в местности шригли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilbert Haydock было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Houghton, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Downes около 1414 г. в местности хеидокк, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1461 г. в местности Англия.
